name: TeamSupport
description: Monitor TeamSupport B2B customer support platform for team access and ticket management compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to TeamSupport at https://app.teamsupport.com
2. Go to Admin → Settings → API
3. Copy your Organization ID and API Token
4. Base64 encode them: echo -n 'OrganizationID:APIToken' | base64
5. Enter the encoded value below

credentialFields.label: Encoded API Credentials
credentialFields.helpText: Base64 encode 'OrganizationID:APIToken'. Found in TeamSupport Admin → Settings → API. Command: echo -n 'orgid:apitoken' | base64

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews TeamSupport agent accounts with access to the customer support platform

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies TeamSupport customer support platform is operational
